context: First goal run on the REGISTERED goal-maker/goal-verifier agents (routing + tool-allowlist verification).

criteria.refutation_attempted: Independently reproduced key assertions via adversarial malformed inputs (duplicate ids, null-evidence passing criterion, invalid status, bad JSON, no-args) — all handled per the documented rules.
